summary: Tested MiraTopBar UI/UX overhaul on /mira-demo page. All major features are working correctly: Login flow, MiraTopBar rendering, all buttons (Picks, History, Reminders, Insights, Soul, Learn, Contact, New Chat, Dashboard) are clickable and functional. Old NavigationDock and FloatingActionBar have been successfully replaced.

code_quality.issue: Unused imports: NavigationDock and FloatingActionBar are imported at lines 46-47 but not used - should be removed for cleaner code

action_items: Remove unused imports of NavigationDock and FloatingActionBar from MiraDemoPage.jsx (lines 46-47)
critical_code_review_comments: MiraTopBar component has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Mobile responsive design is working - icons shown without labels on small screens
Contact dropdown correctly shows WhatsApp, Email, Call options
Old duplicate navigation elements (NavigationDock, FloatingActionBar) have been removed from the render
Location auto-detection working - shows 'Council Bluffs' based on user's location
context_for_next_testing_agent: MiraTopBar UI overhaul testing complete. All 13 test items from review_request verified: 1) Login flow works, 2) MiraTopBar renders correctly, 3) Pet photo + soul score visible in top bar, 4) Dashboard button navigates to /dashboard, 5) Picks button opens PersonalizedPicksPanel, 6) History button opens PastChatsPanel, 7) Reminders dropdown shows alerts, 8) Contact dropdown shows WhatsApp/Email/Phone, 9) Soul button opens SoulFormModal, 10) Learn button opens LearnModal, 11) New Chat button works, 12) Old NavigationDock removed, 13) Location auto-detected and displayed.

tested_flows.notes: Login works correctly with dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123

tested_flows.flow: Pet photo and soul score in top bar
tested_flows.notes: Pet avatar with 'M' initial, '56% SOUL' badge, and '0%' indicator visible
Clicking Dashboard button navigates to /dashboard showing Dipali's Dashboard
Clicking Picks opens panel with 'Personalized for Mojo' showing Celebrate, Dine, Care, Travel, Stay categories
Clicking History opens PastChatsPanel with 'Start New Chat' and past conversation list
Reminders button shows badge with count (8), dropdown with data-testid='reminders-dropdown' opens
Contact dropdown contains WhatsApp, Email, and Call options as verified by data-testid='contact-dropdown'
Clicking Soul opens 'Know Mojo Better - 3 quick questions' modal with energy level question
Learn button is functional and opens videos
New Chat button with data-testid='refresh-chat-btn' is present and clickable
No .navigation-dock or .floating-action-bar classes found in rendered page
Location shows 'Council Bluffs' - auto-detected from user's location
Clicking Insights opens 'Mira's Insights for Mojo' panel
MiraTopBar works on mobile (390x844) - icons shown without labels, all buttons accessible
